steps.title: Evaluate f at x=0
steps.content:
$$f(0)=50(0)+12=12$$
At the moment the train crosses the city border, x = 0 hours. The function value f(0) gives the distance from the station at that time, which is 12 kilometers.

steps.title: Interpret the constant term
steps.content:
The constant term 12 is the distance from the station when x = 0, i.e., before any time has passed after crossing the border. Therefore, the train had already traveled 12 kilometers from the station to reach the city border.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
